description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped storage box made of a solid, light brown plastic material. The box features reinforced edges and corners, with a series of horizontal and vertical ribs for added structural strength. Both shorter ends of the box have large, rectangular cut-out handles for easy lifting and carrying. The sides are solid with a few open slits near the top, providing ventilation and reducing weight. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding various items commonly found in urban environments such as tools, groceries, or recyclables. The overall design is utilitarian, stackable, and easy to clean, making it ideal for use in garages, storage rooms, or outdoor settings.
description: A sturdy, light brown plastic storage box with open handles and reinforced ribbing, designed for practical urban use. The box is open-topped and features ventilation slits near the rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing a solid panel with a large rectangular handle cut-out at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three vertical ribbed sections and open slits along the upper edge.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with a solid panel and a rectangular handle cut-out.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side, with three ribbed sections and upper slits.
attribute_handle_design: rectangular cut-out handles on both short sides
